about.metaDescription: Discover ATTABL, the SaaS platform for digital restaurant and hospitality management.
about.heading: About ATTABL
about.intro: ATTABL is a SaaS platform designed to digitize the management of restaurants, hotels and dining venues. Our mission: simplify operators' daily work with modern, intuitive tools.
about.visionBody: We believe every venue, from the small bistro to the large hotel, deserves high-performance digital tools. ATTABL provides a QR code menu, a real-time order system, a touch POS, a kitchen display (KDS), and advanced analytics - all in one platform.
about.techBody: Built on the latest technologies (Next.js, React, Supabase, Tailwind CSS), ATTABL is fast, secure and available as a Progressive Web App (PWA) across all devices.

legal.metaDescription: Terms of service for the ATTABL platform.
legal.heading: Terms of Service
legal.section1Body: These Terms of Service (ToS) govern access to and use of the ATTABL platform, a SaaS service for digital restaurant and hospitality management.
legal.section2Body: Access to ATTABL requires the creation of a user account. The user undertakes to provide accurate and up-to-date information when registering.
legal.section3Body: ATTABL offers monthly and annual subscription plans. Current pricing is available on the
legal.section3BodyCont: page. Any pricing change will be communicated 30 days in advance.
legal.section4Body: Data entered by the user (menus, orders, customers) remains their exclusive property. ATTABL undertakes not to commercialize this data.
legal.section5Body: For any question regarding these ToS, contact us at

nouveautes.pageSubtitle: The latest features and improvements from Attabl.

updates.rbacDescription: 6 roles (owner, admin, manager, cashier, chef, server) with granular permissions. Each teammate sees exactly what they need.
updates.i18nDescription: Interface available in French and English. Switch language with one click.
updates.autolockDescription: Protect sensitive data: the screen locks after a configurable period of inactivity.
updates.stockAlertDescription: Receive an automatic email when an ingredient drops below the critical threshold. Resend integration.
updates.suppliersDescription: Manage your suppliers, contacts and product references directly from the dashboard.
updates.stockHistoryDescription: Complete traceability: every entry, exit and adjustment is recorded with author and reason.
updates.landingDescription: New visual identity with hero video, mega-menu, segment pages and Framer Motion animations.
updates.qrDescription: 6 QR code templates with real-time preview and PDF export.

quickService.heroSubtitle: Counter, drive-thru, delivery - every order tracked from customer to kitchen.
quickService.feature1Description: Orders show in real time. Automatic priority. Prep time visible.
quickService.feature2Description: Checkout in 3 clicks. Cash, card, mobile money. Every transaction tracked.
quickService.feature3Description: Your customers and your team are informed at every stage of the order.

barsCafes.heroTitle: Your bar. Your terrace. Everything under control.
barsCafes.heroSubtitle: Cocktail menu, terrace service, drink inventory - all in one.
barsCafes.feature1Description: Customers scan from their table, order without waiting for a server. No more back and forth.
barsCafes.feature2Description: Every glass served is deducted from stock. See spillage in real time. No more invisible losses.
barsCafes.feature3Description: Which cocktails are selling tonight? Which beers are stagnating? Adjust your menu in real time.
barsCafes.ctaTitle: Your bar deserves better than a spreadsheet.

fastFood.heroSubtitle: Kitchen display, centralized inventory. Speed at scale.
fastFood.feature1Description: Performance of each location in real time. Compare, identify, optimize.
fastFood.feature2Description: Orders go straight to the kitchen. Automatic priority, zero errors.
fastFood.feature3Description: Centralized procurement for all your locations. Alerts per site, per ingredient.

hotels.heroTitle: One hotel. Several restaurants. One platform.
hotels.heroSubtitle: Room service, bar, restaurant - your guests order in their language, you manage everything in one place.
hotels.feature1Description: Unique QR code per room. Guests order from their bed, in their language. Zero front-desk calls.
hotels.feature2Description: Restaurant, lounge bar, pool, room service. One dashboard to control everything.
hotels.feature3Description: Menu in French, English, and more. Payment in XAF, EUR, USD. Your international guests feel at home.
hotels.ctaTitle: Your guests come from everywhere. Your service should keep up.

restaurants.heroTitle: Your floor. Your kitchen. All connected.
restaurants.heroSubtitle: From the order to the plate, nothing gets lost.
restaurants.feature1Description: Categories, subcategories, allergens, photos. Your customers see everything from their phone.
restaurants.feature2Description: Starters, mains, desserts - each station gets its orders at the right time. No more shouting.
restaurants.feature3Description: Ingredients, proportions, material cost. You know exactly how much you make per dish.
